creationBlockedBy: No explicit human reviewer decision to begin recording real notes is present in repo evidence.

creationPrerequisites.name: Human reviewer explicitly ready to record real notes
creationPrerequisites.evidence: No repo artifact can prove this; it must be an explicit human decision before running the write command.

creationPrerequisites.name: Dry run passed
creationPrerequisites.evidence: Initializer is in dry_run mode, wroteStatusOverlay:false, notesFilled:0.

creationPrerequisites.name: Overwrite protection passed
creationPrerequisites.evidence: 3/3 protection cases passed and real overlay untouched.

creationPrerequisites.name: Starter blank fields ready
creationPrerequisites.evidence: 12 lesson cards and 72 blank note fields are present.

creationPrerequisites.name: Handoff packet available
creationPrerequisites.evidence: Handoff and dry-run packet both include this checklist before real overlay creation; packet covers rewrite_batch_01, rewrite_batch_05 with 12 worksheet lessons.

creationPrerequisites.name: No approval, release, or production flags
creationPrerequisites.evidence: All checked artifacts keep approvalStatus:not_approved, learnerFacingRelease:false, and productionReady:false.

stopConditions: Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json exists before the creation command; preserve existing notes before any force path.
Stop if any note field is prefilled before real review work starts.
Stop if any artifact asks to approve, publish, mark commercial_ready, or set productionReady:true.
Stop if any note or rewrite requests buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, broker/order workflow, automation, performance claims, or real-money guidance.
Stop if any external source body text is proposed for copying into lesson prose or notes.
Stop if yellow, red, or research_only sources are proposed as learner-facing evidence.
boundary: This checklist is reviewer-facing gate scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change lesson grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
